title: Aurora, 60960, Sparkle Tales, Blizzard Husky Dog, 12In, Soft Toy, Silver
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sparkle Tales Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgeous Sparkle accent materials, with glitter eyes
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: Product Description The Sparkle Tales Kingdom is a fantasy world where all kinds of magical creatures live. It is a place where fairy tales and imaginations are free to roam. The Sparkle Tales World consists of forests, desert, sea and a magical castle. Blizzard Husky Dog lives in Mirror Valley within the Sparkle Tales Kingdom with the other Sparkle Tales animals. Blizzard has a beautiful grey and white body which is super-soft and perfect for cuddles. He has a gorgeous silver sparkly material which compliments his beautiful sparkly eyes. Blizzard loves hanging out with his fellow animals and has many friends throughout the Sparkle Tales Kingdom. Collect them all. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Sparkle Tales Blizzard Husky Dog
